commercialUse.valueCandidate: Synthesys markets AI UGC creation without licensing restrictions.
commercialUse.snippet: The homepage says Synthesys can generate lifelike AI UGC-style videos without licensing restrictions.

usageRights.valueCandidate: Synthesys privacy policy says clients retain full ownership of their data and client data is not used to train AI models.
usageRights.snippet: The privacy policy says client data is not used to train or retrain models and that clients retain full ownership of their data.

refundCancellation.valueCandidate: Synthesys refunds are limited to requests within 72 hours and below 5 minutes of usage.
refundCancellation.snippet: Synthesys states that refund requests must be made within 72 hours and are only eligible when plan usage stays below 5 minutes of video or voice usage.

refundCancellation.valueCandidate: Synthesys cancellations are handled from the My Plan section and access continues until the end of the billing cycle.
refundCancellation.snippet: The refund and cancellation policy explains that users cancel from My Plan and continue to have service access until the current cycle ends.

workflowFeatureDocs.valueCandidate: Synthesys features include voice cloning, AI talking avatars, AI talking photos, instant avatars, multilingual translation, and idea-to-video.
workflowFeatureDocs.snippet: The features page lists voice cloning, talking avatars, talking photos, instant avatars, multilingual translation, and idea-to-video among the core capabilities.

security.valueCandidate: Synthesys privacy policy states that client data is not used for AI model training.
security.snippet: The privacy policy explicitly states no client data is used to train, retrain, or enhance AI models.

api.valueCandidate: Synthesys exposes a text-to-speech API with API key access, 140+ languages, 300+ voices, and SSML support.
api.snippet: The TTS API page says users obtain an API key, can automate voice generation in 140+ languages with 300+ voices, and have SSML support.
api.sourceTitle: Text-to-speech API: Automate your voiceovers | Synthesys.io

enterprise.valueCandidate: Synthesys API onboarding is handled through the sales team for custom setup.
enterprise.snippet: The API page recommends speaking with the sales team to get the right API setup and onboarding path.
enterprise.sourceTitle: Text-to-speech API: Automate your voiceovers | Synthesys.io

pages.title: Text-to-speech API: Automate your voiceovers | Synthesys.io
